ogTitle: Yarratt Forest vs Yarrawa: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yarratt Forest and Yarrawa.
heading: Yarratt Forest vs Yarrawa — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarratt Forest, New South Wales and Yarrawa, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yarratt Forest has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Yarrawa (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yarratt Forest or Yarrawa safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarratt Forest has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Yarrawa scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarratt Forest scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Yarrawa scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarratt Forest or Yarrawa?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yarratt Forest has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
